base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tractor_beam_deploy — a effect_layer from 1981 galaga. Boss-Galaga tractor beam — 4-frame expanding concentric rings of blue-yellow-red projecting downward from hovering Boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Boss-Galaga tractor beam — 4-frame expanding concentric rings of blue-yellow-red projecting downward from hovering Boss; width grows on each frame then loops. If player ship enters beam, it's captured and attached beneath Boss (must be rescued for dual-fighter state)
